zh.lifeSummary: John Nicholls於1628年5月6日出生在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德。他和Dorothy Parsons至少有2個女兒。他去世於1705年11月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其享年77歲，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其克里斯蒂 邱奇 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Nicholls于1628年5月6日出生在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德。他和Dorothy Parsons至少有2个女儿。他去世于1705年11月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其享年77岁，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州米德萊可可利斯丘其克里斯蒂 邱奇 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Nicholls
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Dutch: variant of   Nichols  .

variants.name: Nichols
meanings: English: variant of Nichol , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ); see also below.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: John Nicholls was born on 6 May 1628, in Chelmsford, Essex, England. He had at least 2 daughters with Dorothy Parsons. He died on 27 November 1705, in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 77, and was buried in Christ Church Cemetery, Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, United States.

it.lifeSummary: John Nicholls è nato il il 6 maggio 1628 nel Chelmsford, Essex, England. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Dorothy Parsons. Morì il 27 novembre 1705, nel Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Christ Church Cemetery, Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Nichollsは1628年5月6日にイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードで生まれた。彼はDorothy Parsonsとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1705年11月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスチリストチャーチで77歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バージニア州ミッドレセックスチリストチャーチチリスト チャーチ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Nicholls(은)는 1628년 5월 6일 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 태어났다. 그는 Dorothy Parsons(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1705년 11월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트c후르치에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트c후르치 크리스트 c후르치 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Nicholls nasceu em 6 de maio de 1628, em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Dorothy Parsons. Ele faleceu em 27 de novembro de 1705, em Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Christ Church Cemetery, Christchurch, Middlesex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: John Nicholls родился 6 мая 1628 г. в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Dorothy Parsons. Он умер 27 ноября 1705 г. в местности крисчурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности краист чурч кеметири, крисчурч, миддлесекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.
